_comment: Per-photo title/location/story, keyed by filename stem. Edit freely, then run: tools/.venv/bin/python tools/build_manifest.py. EXIF (camera/lens/settings/year) is auto-filled. Stories are first-draft — adjust to taste. Blank locations are ones I couldn't place; fill them in.

20160503_164015.title: Drift
20160503_164015.story: Weightless and lit from within, going nowhere in particular.

ANK00325.title: First Stars
ANK00325.story: The blue hour gives up, and the first real stars arrive.

ANK00330.title: A Single Streak
ANK00330.story: One piece of rock, older than the planet, ending its run in a line.

ANK01923.title: Galactic Core
ANK01923.story: Looking straight into the bright heart of the galaxy we live in.

ANK02413.title: The Faint Arm
ANK02413.story: A spiral arm you only see once your eyes forget the city.

ANK01925.title: Night Over Stone
ANK01925.story: The sky does the moving; the rock has waited here for the show.

ANK03670.title: Full Moon
ANK03670.story: Close enough to count the seas, far enough to stay a mystery.

ANK03953.title: Half Light
ANK03953.story: The terminator line, where lunar day meets lunar night.

DSC00247.title: Arteries
DSC00247.story: Thirty seconds of shutter turns the traffic into the city's bloodstream.

ANK08119.title: Burst
ANK08119.story: A whole year's worth of patience, spent in three seconds.

DSC02809.title: Light, Written
DSC02809.story: Long exposure, the camera tossed — light signing its own name.

DSC02774.title: Canal House, Midnight
DSC02774.story: Amsterdam after the crowds, when the canal houses keep their own counsel.

DSC00274-EDIT.title: The Fountain
DSC00274-EDIT.story: The fountain throws light while the streets behind it stream past.

DSC00253.title: Stop, Wait, Go
DSC00253.story: The three small suns every city agrees to obey.

ANK00003.title: Balanced
ANK00003.story: A boulder that has been about to fall for ten thousand years.

ANK00009.title: The Pile
ANK00009.story: Stone stacked by nothing but time and weather.

ANK09969.title: Joshua
ANK09969.story: The tree that named a desert, holding its arms up to nobody.

ANK01938.title: Königssee
ANK01938.story: Still water, steep walls, and the kind of quiet you can hear.

ANK01856.title: Green Walls
ANK01856.story: Summer turns the slopes to felt; the cloud decides the mood.

ANK03364.title: Valley Light
ANK03364.story: Late sun finds the one valley still holding colour.

ANK03368.title: The Ridge
ANK03368.story: Ridge behind ridge, each one paler than the last.

ANK03352.title: Ridge Behind Ridge
ANK03352.story: Distance made visible — the air itself becomes the subject.

ANK03396.title: Far Peaks
ANK03396.story: The farthest peaks barely commit to being there at all.

ANK09500.title: Canyon at First Light
ANK09500.story: The first sun hits the far rim while the floor is still deciding to wake.

ANK09501.title: The Rim
ANK09501.story: A mile down and a billion years deep, lit for about four minutes.

ANK09470-Enhanced-NR.title: One Bird Over the Canyon
ANK09470-Enhanced-NR.story: Scale, explained: one bird, and all of that behind it.

ANK09579.title: Red Walls
ANK09579.story: Iron in the rock, oxidised over ages into this exact red.

ANK09731.title: The Switchback
ANK09731.story: The road gives up arguing with the mountain and just zigzags.

ANK09748.title: Through the Red
ANK09748.story: Driving through stone that was a seabed once.

ANK09564-Pano.title: The Whole Canyon
ANK09564-Pano.story: Too wide for one frame, so here are several, stitched.

ANK09543-PANO.title: Canyon Panorama
ANK09543-PANO.story: The view that makes everyone go quiet at the same time.

ANK02917-Pano.title: Sun on the Water
ANK02917-Pano.story: The sun lays a path across the water it has no intention of keeping.

ANK02940.title: Last Light, Alone
ANK02940.story: One figure, the whole horizon, and a minute of good light left.

ANK02923.title: The Sinking Sun
ANK02923.story: The day's last decision, made in orange.

ANK00528-Pano.title: Dawn Layers
ANK00528-Pano.story: Morning sorts the mountains into layers, nearest to furthest.

DSC01660.title: The Falls
DSC01660.story: Meltwater that was snow this morning, in a hurry to be a river.

DSC00427.title: Purple Dusk
DSC00427.story: The five minutes when the snow goes violet and nobody's watching.

DSC01739.title: Snowline
DSC01739.story: Where the green gives up and the white takes over.

DSC05009.title: From the Window
DSC05009.story: The mountains you only ever meet from thirty thousand feet.

ANK09879.title: Ridgelines into Haze
ANK09879.story: Ridge dissolving into ridge until the island simply runs out.

ANK08834.title: Empire
ANK08834.story: The building that taught the others how to stand.

ANK08837.title: One World, From the Harbour
ANK08837.story: From the water, the city is just one tall idea.

ANK08964-Pano.title: The Island
ANK08964-Pano.story: The most photographed skyline on earth, trying for an honest frame.

ANK08960.title: Straight Up
ANK08960.story: Looking up until the tower disappears into its own perspective.

ANK09117.title: The Park and the Towers
ANK09117.story: The one rectangle of calm the city agreed to leave alone.

ANK08909.title: Red Seam
ANK08909.story: A single red awning, holding a grey façade together.

ANK09062.title: Grid
ANK09062.story: Windows by the thousand, each one somebody's afternoon.

DSC03852.title: Glass, Looking Up
DSC03852.story: Steel and glass, leaning into the sky.

DSC05199.title: The Edge of Glass
DSC05199.story: Where two glass walls meet the cloud and argue about who reflects it.

ANK09243.title: Façade
ANK09243.story: Repetition, until it becomes a rhythm.

ANK09212.title: Wing
ANK09212.story: Calatrava's bones — a station that wanted to be a bird.

ANK09220.title: Inside the Rib
ANK09220.story: Inside the whale, where the light is rationed by rib.

ANK03755-Enhanced-NR.title: Marienplatz
ANK03755-Enhanced-NR.story: The square Munich uses to keep its history within view.

ANK03944.title: The Angel
ANK03944.story: Gold against a darkening sky — the city's quiet guardian.

ANK09153.title: Bethesda
ANK09153.story: The fountain that has watched a century of New Yorkers walk past.

ANK08090.title: Ring of Light
ANK08090.story: A ring of light on dark water, doing nothing useful, perfectly.

DSC04086.title: Lit Windows
DSC04086.story: A grid of lives, each window a different hour.

ANK09313.title: The Tower
ANK09313.story: Deco ambition, still pointing the way it was told to.

ANK00246.title: The Leaning Tower
ANK00246.story: Eight centuries of slowly almost-falling, and still showing off.

ANK00257.title: Duomo
ANK00257.story: The cathedral the famous tower was only ever meant to announce.

ANK00285.title: The Colosseum
ANK00285.story: Where a city once went to watch itself, now watching us back.

ANK02676.title: Blue Mosque at Dusk
ANK02676.story: Six minarets against the last blue of the day.

ANK02673.title: Minaret
ANK02673.story: A single spire, built to carry a voice across a whole city.

ANK03010.title: Fairy Chimneys
ANK03010.story: Stone the wind has been sculpting since before anyone watched.

ANK03002.title: The Valley
ANK03002.story: A valley carved soft, where people once lived inside the rock.

ANK03441.title: What the Romans Left
ANK03441.story: Columns still standing for an audience that left two thousand years ago.

ANK03458.title: Relief
ANK03458.story: Carved faces worn nearly smooth, still insisting on being remembered.

ANK03580.title: Terraces
ANK03580.story: Mineral water cooling into white terraces, step by step, for millennia.

ANK03575.title: Travertine
ANK03575.story: Calcium and time, building a staircase the colour of cloud.

IMG_20160811_235132.title: Red Fort
IMG_20160811_235132.story: Mughal sandstone, lit at night, still holding the line.

ANK02998.title: Carved Country
ANK02998.story: A landscape that looks built, but only weather did this.

ANK03675.title: The Flag on the Hill
ANK03675.story: A flag on the headland, claiming the wind if nothing else.

ANK07505.title: Air-Cooled
ANK07505.story: A 911 the way they used to make them — cooled by nothing but the air it splits.

ANK07684.title: Redline
ANK07684.story: The dials that only tell the truth at speed.

ANK09866.title: The Long Haul
ANK09866.story: Eighteen wheels and a horizon that never gets closer.

ANK09947.title: Empty Road
ANK09947.story: One car, one road, and a desert that doesn't care either way.

ANK02304.title: Snow Pass
ANK02304.story: A pass that's only open for the brave and the well-tyred.

ANK00017.title: Into the Mountains
ANK00017.story: The road commits to the mountains and stops apologising.

ANK00049.title: Traffic, with a View
ANK00049.story: Even the traffic jam comes with a mountain range.

ANK00661.title: Breach
ANK00661.story: Half a ton of muscle, choosing to leave the water for a second.

ANK00685.title: The Pod
ANK00685.story: They surface together, breathe together, and are gone together.

ANK00014.title: Centre Line
ANK00014.story: The dashed line doing its best to organise the emptiness.

ANK09994.title: Desert Two-Lane
ANK09994.story: Two lanes, no reason to hurry, every reason to keep going.

ANK00158.title: Dune
ANK00158.story: Gypsum sand, white as snow, rippled by a wind that's moved on.

ANK00164.title: Alone in White
ANK00164.story: One figure for scale, in a place that erases scale.

ANK00153.title: Soft Horizon
ANK00153.story: Where the white sand and the white sky agree to blur.

ANK00641.title: Surface
ANK00641.story: Just water and light, agreeing to be enough.

ANK09357.title: Grain
ANK09357.story: Rock close enough to read like wood grain.

ANK02879.title: The Eye
ANK02879.story: The instrument the whole craft is really about.

DSC02274.title: Low Tide
DSC02274.story: Two figures, the whole beach, and the tide somewhere else.

ANK02315.title: Descent
ANK02315.story: A single paraglider, trusting the air over the snow.
